TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: aicu a Kam (Kinaman: Gaeml, IPA: /kɐm˥/) zuku nuaya mavan na i Tailiku a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Tailiku, Vietnam, katjai Myanmar a Kam zuku. supu a supu nua Kam a caucau tucu, izua man 2,879,974 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Tailikuan a Kam a caucau. pungadan a caucau Su Yu Lu Yong Li Ting pacunu uta Viet
S.PHON: aiʦu a kam (kinaman: gaəmɭ, ipa: /k*m*/) zuku nuaja mavan na i taiɭiku a kaizuanan. nasəpaʎavak ʦai taiɭiku, viətnam, kaʦai mjanmar a kam zuku. supu a supu nua kam a ʦauʦau tuʦu, izua man *,***,*** sakaizua, qau ʦaʎaʦuruvuan a i pinui taiɭikuan a kam a ʦauʦau. puŋadan a ʦauʦau su ju ɭu juŋ ɭi tiŋ paʦunu uta viət
S.FORM: aicu a Kam (Kinaman: Gaeml, IPA: /kɐm˥/) zuku nuaya mavan na i Tailiku a kaizuanan. nasepaljavak tjai Tailiku, Vietnam, katjai Myanmar a Kam zuku. supu a supu nua Kam a caucau tucu, izua man 2,879,974 sakaizua, qau tjaljatjuruvuan a i pinui Tailikuan a Kam a caucau. pungadan a caucau Su Yu Lu Yong Li Ting pacunu uta Viet
S.PHON: aiʦu a kam (kinaman: gaəmɭ, ipa: /k*m*/) zuku nuaja mavan na i taiɭiku a kaizuanan. nasəpaʎavak ʦai taiɭiku, viətnam, kaʦai mjanmar a kam zuku. supu a supu nua kam a ʦauʦau tuʦu, izua man *,***,*** sakaizua, qau ʦaʎaʦuruvuan a i pinui taiɭikuan a kam a ʦauʦau. puŋadan a ʦauʦau su ju ɭu juŋ ɭi tiŋ paʦunu uta viət
